title: [AINews] Grok 3 & 3-mini Now API Available
summary: X's Grok 3 and Grok 3-mini models are now available via API, with Grok 3 mini positioned as a competitive, cost-effective option showcasing full reasoning traces.
why_included: This is a notable release from X, making its Grok models API-available, which expands the competitive landscape for LLMs.

title: [AINews] OpenAI o3, o4-mini, and Codex CLI
summary: OpenAI has released o3 and o4-mini models, highlighting improvements in tool use and multimodal capabilities, alongside the open-source Codex CLI for coding tasks.
why_included: This is a high-impact announcement detailing the release of OpenAI's new o3 and o4-mini models, along with the open-source Codex CLI, representing significant advancements and developer accessibility.

title: [AINews] SOTA Video Gen: Veo 2 and Kling 2 are GA for developers
summary: Google's Veo 2 and Kling AI's Kling 2, considered state-of-the-art video generation models, are now generally available for developers.
why_included: The general availability of two leading video generation models, Veo 2 and Kling 2, marks a significant advancement in multimodal AI and its accessibility for developers.

title: [AINews] GPT 4.1: The New OpenAI Workhorse
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-4.1 models, emphasizing improvements in coding, instruction following, and a 1 million token context window, with availability in the API and performance competitive with competitors.
why_included: This is a high-impact release of OpenAI's GPT-4.1 models, detailing significant improvements in key areas like coding and context window, and providing performance comparisons with competitors.
